title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Judge, Unknown person #10, Reiju, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Want to become a chef!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In the East Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you... stop blurting out things like that to me!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: It's the German 66!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They really do exist!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Lord Judge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The Kotzians have noticed our presence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not let up! Con- tinue the onslaught!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I run away here and now... in the East Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't have to see Father's face ever again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Will I?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stand back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't get a second chance at this! You'd better not mess it up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: begin the invasion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DEFEAT KOTZIA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What do we have here!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Ah... it's just you, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't recall giving you permission to leave your cell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm leaving this place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one's stopping me... not even you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your stay in the basement seems to have had some adverse ef- facts on your manners.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You are now nothing but a commoner.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way someone of your ILK could ever hope to face and survive the harsh realities of this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It'd be certain death for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I care what you think! Just try and stop me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's music to my ear actually...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how much I wanted it, my humanity just wouldn't allow it. Even as useless as you are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't bring myself to dispose of you with my own hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now this opportunity has presented itself... you wishing to leave here of your own volition...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why on earth would I try and stop you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Feel free to take the key to that iron mask while you're at it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HNG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HN...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: However, as your father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I do have one last thing...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask of you, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It is regarding our familial ties...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Under no circumstances are you to ever identify your- self as my offspring!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are the sole blemish in my life... the one thing that I am ashamed of.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Do I make myself clear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAAHA AAHH!! HNG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAAA AAAHH!!!!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
